findings.description: Trade audit log bucket has public access — SOX violation and regulatory evidence exposure
findings.remediation: Enable uniform bucket-level access and remove allUsers/allAuthenticatedUsers bindings

findings.description: Default firewall rule allows all inbound traffic to trading VPC
findings.remediation: Restrict to specific source IPs and ports for trading operations

findings.description: PCI card data encryption key has automatic rotation disabled — requires annual rotation per PCI-DSS
findings.remediation: Enable automatic key rotation with 365-day period per PCI-DSS v4.0 Requirement 3.6.1

findings.description: Service account has Owner role on production project — violates least privilege
findings.remediation: Apply least-privilege IAM roles: spanner.databaseUser, storage.objectViewer

findings.description: AlloyDB risk model database has public IP enabled
findings.remediation: Disable public IP, use Private Service Connect for VPC-only access

findings.description: DR backup bucket has versioning disabled — cannot recover from ransomware
findings.remediation: Enable S3 versioning and Object Lock for immutable backups

findings.description: EKS DR cluster does not encrypt Kubernetes secrets with customer-managed KMS key
findings.remediation: Enable EKS secrets encryption with dedicated KMS key

findings.description: Settlement database DR replica has encryption at rest disabled — PCI cardholder data exposure
findings.remediation: Enable RDS encryption at rest with KMS customer-managed key

findings.description: CloudTrail log file validation disabled — audit log integrity cannot be verified
findings.remediation: Enable CloudTrail log file integrity validation

findings.description: Deployment bot IAM user has MFA disabled — compromised credentials = full access
findings.remediation: Enable MFA and migrate to IAM roles with AssumeRole for CI/CD

findings.description: BigQuery analytics dataset accessible to allAuthenticatedUsers — trade data exposed
findings.remediation: Remove allAuthenticatedUsers, grant access to specific service accounts only

findings.description: DR ALB has HTTP desync mitigation in monitor mode instead of strictest
findings.remediation: Set desync mitigation to strictest mode to prevent request smuggling
